The '''T-3''' was a model of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] employed on the ice [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Akuria II]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Older and sturdier than the more modern [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]], the T-3 units were resigned to service aboard [[snow flyer]]s, where they apparently had a primary role in the craft's operation, since they vehicle could not function without them.

==Behind the scenes==
The T-3 is mentioned by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Odan]] in the short comic, ''[[The Kingdom of Ice]]'', published many years before the release of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' which contained the [[T3-series utility droid]]. Both models perform nearly identical functions.
